summary: Tesla reduced Model Y price by 8% in China and Germany to aggressively defend market share against BYD and local luxury ICE competitors.
OpenAI unveiled 'GPT-5 Business Prime', a dedicated enterprise-grade agentic architecture with zero-data retention policies for Fortune 100 firms.
Google Cloud division announced a 25% increase in compute infrastructure spending focused specifically on custom TPU v6 clusters in EMEA region.
Amazon Logistics is piloting 'DroneLink Express' in three major Indian metros, aiming for 15-minute delivery on high-margin pharmaceuticals.
Microsoft reported deep integration of Copilot AI across its ERP/CRM stack, resulting in a 14% uplift in enterprise per-seat license revenue.
NVIDIA acquired a 15% stake in a specialized European photonics startup to accelerate chip-to-chip interconnect bandwidth.
Apple reportedly hired two top chip designers from ARM to lead development of its next-generation Silicon for AI data centers.
